pages.title: Glass Shards
pages.text: Breaking $(item)Blood-Stained Glass$() or the $(item)Glass Shards$() block yields fragile $(item)Glass Shards$() — jagged splinters used to craft the sacrificial daggers below. The $(item)Glass Shards$() block, placed, damages any living entity that steps over it.

pages.title: Glass Sacrificial Dagger
pages.text: A self-sacrifice tool. Right-clicking with it in hand draws $(blood)2 HP$() worth of LP to the altar — triple the yield of a standard $(l:bloodmagic:altar)Sacrificial Dagger$(), at the cost of fragility.

pages.title: Glass Dagger of Sacrifice
pages.text: Its counterpart: mobs slain near an altar with this blade yield their full life force into the altar reservoir. Durability is shorter than the iron $(l:bloodmagic:altar)Dagger of Sacrifice$(), the multiplier is higher.
